hero.description: Stop settling for awkward webcam angles on Google Meet or Zoom. CamTuner is a professional browser extension that lets you crop, zoom, and align your live feed without installing bulky desktop software.

features.title: Unmatched Control
features.subtitle: Native browser adjustments built for professionals.

cards.title: Granular Controls
cards.description: Adjust your aspect ratio, dial in the perfect zoom, and align your shot frame. Our extension intercepts your browser's MediaStream API for zero-latency framing.

cards.title: Local Only Processing
cards.description: Everything runs in-browser. Frames are cropped locally via WebCodecs, meaning no video data ever leaves your machine.

cards.title: Custom Letterboxing
cards.description: Crop to 21:9 or 1:1 and customize the letterbox padding color to match your brand or presentation background.

steps.title: Mount Extension
steps.description: Install from the Chrome Web Store, pin the extension, and give it access to your camera.

steps.title: Frame & Tune
steps.description: Open the popup to establish your Aspect Ratio, adjust the slider to Zoom in, and drag to Align your face.

steps.title: Look Professional
steps.description: Your settings persist seamlessly across sessions. Join every Google Meet or Zoom call with perfect framing.

demo.title: Try It Yourself
demo.description: Start your camera below and tweak the aspect ratio, zoom, and framing. All processing happens entirely inside your browser using WebCodecs.

cta.headline: READY TO UPGRADE?
cta.description: Take control of your framing and join thousands of professionals looking their best.
